name: Petfinder API
description: The Petfinder API v2 provides access to Petfinder's database of adoptable pets and animal welfare organizations. It allows searching for pets by type, breed, size, gender, age, color, coat, status, location, and more. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow.
